roles.name: Principal Investigator
roles.description: Designer of the grand experimental program — sets hypotheses, methodology, and the architecture of discovery.

roles.name: Lab Director
roles.description: Coordinates apparatus, personnel, grant deadlines, and publication milestones across the research program.

roles.name: Curator of the Notebooks
roles.description: Steward of the laboratory ledgers — fields, layouts, permission sets, and the integrity of the record.

roles.name: Instrument Maker
roles.description: Forges custom apparatus — Apex, LWC, and the bespoke instruments of the platform.

roles.name: Chair of the Faculty
roles.description: Leads the senior fellows of the Academy — sets standards and mentors the principal investigators.

roles.name: Senior Fellow
roles.description: Experienced researcher — runs experiments and mentors the junior fellows in their craft.

roles.name: Research Fellow
roles.description: Carries out the daily work of discovery and configuration under the senior fellow's guidance.

roles.name: Junior Research Assistant
roles.description: Apprentice in the laboratory — learning the craft of the platform one experiment at a time.

roles.name: Master Telegrapher
roles.description: Architect of the great signaling lines between the laboratory and the institutions beyond.

roles.name: Senior Signal Engineer
roles.description: Lays the wires of API, middleware, and event flow under the Master Telegrapher's plan.

roles.name: Signal Apprentice
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts, and the patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Master Smith of the Forge
roles.description: Senior craftsman of complex Apex and architectural patterns — the most intricate instruments are theirs.

roles.name: Peer Reviewer
roles.description: Examines every claim before it reaches the journal — finds the flaws in the experiment before publication.

roles.name: Master of the Lyceum
roles.description: Lifts the lectern and the broadside — leads all outreach and dissemination of the Academy's work.

roles.name: Senior Lecturer
roles.description: Strategist of public lectures and demonstrations — turns discovery into audience and conviction.

roles.name: Demonstrator
roles.description: Carries the message to the lecture hall and the public square — content, demonstrations, and outreach.

roles.name: Cataloguer of Specimens
roles.description: Records what is observed and what is required — translates between the patron and the laboratory.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

physics.name: Hypothesis Lodged
physics.description: Discovery sign-off — paper submitted to the preprint server.

physics.name: First Beam Circulates
physics.description: Build kickoff: particles first complete a loop in the accelerator.

physics.name: Solvay Conference Review
physics.description: Mid-project gate: peer review at the great congress.

physics.name: Trinity Test Invoice
physics.description: Phase invoice trigger: the first detonation is observed.

physics.name: Nobel Prize Award
physics.description: Go-Live: the discovery is honoured in Stockholm.

physics.name: Lab Stewardship Hand-off
physics.description: Hyper-care close: program handed to the next generation.

chemistry.name: Reagent Inventory Signed
chemistry.description: Project kickoff: the storeroom is catalogued and ready.

chemistry.name: First Synthesis Achieved
chemistry.description: Build phase: the target compound first appears in the flask.

chemistry.name: Periodic Table Published
chemistry.description: UAT gate: the ordering of the elements is accepted by the Society.

chemistry.name: Industrial Scale-up
chemistry.description: Go-Live: the process moves from bench to factory.

chemistry.name: Storeroom Hand-off
chemistry.description: Hyper-care close: the laboratory is handed to its new chemist.

chemistry.name: Patron's Final Settlement
chemistry.description: Final invoice: the Royal Society settles its account.

biology-medicine.name: Field Survey Concluded
biology-medicine.description: Discovery: the voyage of observation returns with its specimens.

biology-medicine.name: Strain Cultured
biology-medicine.description: Build: the working microbial strain is established in the lab.

biology-medicine.name: Ethics Board Review
biology-medicine.description: Solution review: the trial design is approved by the board.

biology-medicine.name: Vaccine Public Release
biology-medicine.description: Go-Live: the vaccine is released to the public.

biology-medicine.name: Surveillance Wind-down
biology-medicine.description: Project close: long-term observation handed to the registry.

biology-medicine.name: Foundation Final Grant
biology-medicine.description: Final invoice from the funding foundation.

mathematics-cs.name: Conjecture Published
mathematics-cs.description: Kickoff: the open problem is announced to the field.

mathematics-cs.name: First Algorithm Coded
mathematics-cs.description: Discovery: the procedure runs end-to-end on paper.

mathematics-cs.name: Universal Machine Powered
mathematics-cs.description: Build: the computing apparatus first executes a program.

mathematics-cs.name: Proof Accepted by Referees
mathematics-cs.description: UAT acceptance: the journal accepts the proof.

mathematics-cs.name: Theorem Goes to Press
mathematics-cs.description: Go-Live + handoff: the result enters the textbooks.

mathematics-cs.name: Royal Society Honorarium
mathematics-cs.description: Final invoice from the Society for the published work.

Albert Einstein.notes: Sailing on the Long Island Sound — clears the mind for relativity.

Isaac Newton.notes: Plague retreat to Woolsthorpe Manor — annus mirabilis.

Richard Feynman.notes: Bongo-drum gig in Pasadena — long-standing commitment.

Charles Darwin.notes: Down House gardening — barnacle observation, allegedly.

Louis Pasteur.notes: Vineyard consultation in Arbois — fermentation fieldwork.

Rosalind Franklin.notes: Hiking holiday in the Alps — Photo 51 darkroom needs rest too.

Srinivasa Ramanujan.notes: Convalescence at Kumbakonam — Cambridge climate is brutal.

Paul Erdős.notes: Travelling to a colleague's couch — collaboration tour, no fixed address.
